nasb.text: And two blind men sitting by the road, hearing that Jesus was passing by, cried out, “Lord, have mercy on us, Son of David!”

esv.text: And behold, there were two blind men sitting by the roadside, and when they heard that Jesus was passing by, they cried out, “Lord, have mercy on us, Son of David!”

cnv.text: 有兩個瞎眼的人坐在路旁，聽說耶穌經過，就喊叫：“主啊，大衛的子孫，可憐我們吧！”

ccb.text: 有两个瞎子正坐在路旁，听说耶稣经过，就高声喊叫：“主啊，大卫的后裔啊，可怜我们吧！”

csbs.text: 这时候有两个瞎眼的坐在路边，他们听说是耶稣经过那里，就呼叫说：“主啊，大卫的后裔，可怜我们吧！”
